font-family.$description: Sub-heads drop to the reading face — Instrument Serif is used large only.

spacing-before.$description: Sub-sections separate less than full sections.

font-size.$description: Font size for H3 elements with .prose applied directly or that are a child of a .prose container.

font-weight.$description: Font weight for H3 elements with .prose applied directly or that are a child of a .prose container.

letter-spacing.$description: Tracking for H3 elements with .prose applied directly or that are a child of a .prose container.

measure.$description: Maximum width for H3 elements with .prose applied directly or that are a child of a .prose container.

color.$description: Color of H3 elements with .prose applied directly or that are a child of a .prose container.

font-style.$description: Font style for H3 elements with .prose applied directly or that are a child of a .prose container.

text-transform.$description: Text transform for H3 elements with .prose applied directly or that are a child of a .prose container.
